name: Who am I?
short_description: A man named Mark, who struggles to make ends meet, receives a letter informing him that his aunt has passed away. Despite their troubled past, Mark decides to investigate what happened, hoping to uncover the truth and perhaps find a chance for a better life.
detailed_description:
"Who am I ?" is a first-person psychological horror game with a linear narrative and an average playtime of 50-60 minutes to complete.

Story

You step into the shoes of Mark, a man trapped in a life he never dreamed of living. After receiving a letter announcing the death of his aunt, he decides to travel to his childhood home in search of answers and, perhaps, a chance to change his fate. However, what he finds is a place filled with buried secrets and terrifying memories.

Gameplay

The game is primarily a first-person walking simulator, with elements of exploration and interaction designed to immerse the player in an oppressive and mystery-laden atmosphere. As you progress, you will explore the rooms of the house, uncovering the fragments of the  story.

Game Features

  • Immersive and unsettling atmosphere

  • Explore various locations

  • Complete different tasks

  • Solve the mystery

  • Engage in psychological tension

  • In-depth narrative and psychological horror elements

  • Minimalistic gameplay mechanics

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Polish
